area: Git index / backlog maintenance under parallel WIP
finding: When another lane has files staged in the shared index, a separate low-risk backlog/projection update cannot use the normal ATM commit flow without risk of mixing staged payloads. The captain must resort to pathspec-only/native commit strategies or wait, even though the backlog item is unrelated.
expectedBehavior: ATM should provide a broker-managed transactional commit/staging lane for unrelated low-risk maintenance that can submit a path-bounded commit request without disturbing or consuming another actor?s staged WIP.
evidenceOrRepro: During Plan 3.1 backlog writeback, `atm next` reported 9 staged files from Cursor 0257 WIP while the requested scope was only docs/governance backlog files; framework temp claim warned ATM_FRAMEWORK_STAGED_RESIDUE_DETECTED.
followUp: Fold this concrete staged-index example into ATM-BUG-228 / transactional commit queue acceptance: path-bounded commit submission, queue ticket, and staged-residue isolation evidence.
